facebook.content:
Is your pursuit of intimacy with God hindering your intimacy with your spouse? 

When we prioritize a deepening relationship with Christ, our relationships on earth are naturally affected. But what happens when our fervor for the Lord begins to overshadow our love for those closest to us?

instagram.content:
What is the true cost of being a follower of Jesus in your everyday life – at work, at home, and in your relationships?

At IFM, we know that being a disciple is not just a Sunday morning activity, but a 24/7 lifestyle. Are you prepared to pay the price of true Kingdom living?
